name: Homemade Mincemeat
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large, heavy pot.
2. Simmer until thick.
3. Makes about 3 quarts. Freeze mincemeat in one-cup portions.
- Serving size: 1/3 cup (44 calories, 1 Fruit & Vegetable choice .6 grams protein, .2 grams fat, 11.3 grams carbohydrate, 1 gram fiber)
